requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency Performance for Lighting (EPRA / KEBS minimum performance)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明产品能效性能（EPRA / KEBS 最低性能要求）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明產品能效性能（EPRA / KEBS 最低性能要求）

summary.en: Kenya regulates the energy performance of lighting through the Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (EPRA) under the Energy Act 2019 and the Energy (Appliances Energy Efficiency and Labelling) Regulations, working together with KEBS standards. Regulated appliances must meet minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) and carry a star-rating energy label where the product category is gazetted. For self-ballasted LED lamps, the applicable Kenya Standard adopts the IEC performance series (KS IEC 62612 for performance of self-ballasted LED lamps). Unlike the EU Ecodesign Regulation, Kenya does not impose a single horizontal regulation fixing one lm/W floor, a CRI minimum, a lifetime minimum, and a power factor minimum across all luminaires; the binding obligations are the gazetted MEPS for the specific covered category plus the KS performance standard referenced under PVoC. Verify the current EPRA gazette notice and the KS edition for the exact product type before relying on any single threshold.
summary.zh: 肯尼亚通过能源和石油监管局（EPRA），依据《2019 年能源法》及《能源（电器能效与标识）条例》并与 KEBS 标准协同，监管照明产品能效。受管制电器须满足最低能效标准（MEPS），并在产品类别已公告（gazetted）时加贴星级能效标签。对于自镇流 LED 灯，适用的肯尼亚标准采用 IEC 性能系列（KS IEC 62612，自镇流 LED 灯性能）。与欧盟生态设计法规不同，肯尼亚不以单一横向法规对所有灯具统一规定 lm/W 下限、最低显色指数、最低寿命及最低功率因数；约束性义务为针对具体受管制类别公告的 MEPS，加上 PVoC 下引用的 KS 性能标准。在依据任何单一阈值前，请核查现行 EPRA 公告及具体产品类型的 KS 版本。
summary.zht: 肯亞通過能源和石油監管局（EPRA），依據《2019 年能源法》及《能源（電器能效與標識）條例》並與 KEBS 標準協同，監管照明產品能效。受管制電器須滿足最低能效標準（MEPS），並在產品類別已公告（gazetted）時加貼星級能效標籤。對於自鎮流 LED 燈，適用的肯亞標準採用 IEC 性能系列（KS IEC 62612，自鎮流 LED 燈性能）。與歐盟生態設計法規不同，肯亞不以單一橫向法規對所有燈具統一規定 lm/W 下限、最低顯色指數、最低壽命及最低功率因數；約束性義務為針對具體受管制類別公告的 MEPS，加上 PVoC 下引用的 KS 性能標準。在依據任何單一閾值前，請核查現行 EPRA 公告及具體產品類型的 KS 版本。

standards_or_laws: Energy Act 2019 (Kenya) and the Energy (Appliances Energy Efficiency and Labelling) Regulations — administered by EPRA
KS IEC 62612 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements (Kenya Standard adopting IEC 62612)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires). It defines three energy efficiency grades: Grade 1 (highest) at the top, Grade 2 in the middle, and Grade 3 as the minimum required for market entry in China. The China Energy Label (CEL) registration is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products and is administered by SAMR. CN energy classification uses absolute lm/W thresholds tied to fixed grades.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个能效等级：1 级（最高）位于顶端，2 级居中，3 级为中国市场准入最低要求。中国能效标识（CEL）注册对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理。中国能效分级采用与固定等级挂钩的绝对 lm/W 阈值。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個能效等級：1 級（最高）位於頂端，2 級居中，3 級為中國市場准入最低要求。中國能效標識（CEL）注冊對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理。中國能效分級採用與固定等級掛鈎的絕對 lm/W 閾值。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: Kenya does not have a single EU-style horizontal Ecodesign regulation; energy-performance obligations apply per gazetted appliance category through EPRA MEPS plus the relevant KS performance standard (e.g., KS IEC 62612 for self-ballasted LED lamps). A Chinese manufacturer holding only a GB 30255 / CEL grade cannot rely on it for Kenya: (1) the CN grade does not map to an EPRA star rating, which is derived under the gazetted MEPS metric; (2) the product type may need testing to the adopted KS IEC performance standard as part of PVoC; (3) where the lamp category is gazetted, the EPRA energy label must be applied for the Kenyan market. Confirm whether the specific product (LED lamp vs. integrated luminaire) is within a gazetted EPRA category, and verify the current MEPS level and KS edition before shipment.
gap.zh: 肯尼亚没有单一欧盟式横向生态设计法规；能效义务按公告的电器类别，通过 EPRA 的 MEPS 加上相关 KS 性能标准（如自镇流 LED 灯的 KS IEC 62612）适用。仅持有 GB 30255 / CEL 等级的中国制造商不能据此满足肯尼亚要求：（1）中国等级不能映射为 EPRA 星级，后者依据公告的 MEPS 计量方法得出；（2）作为 PVoC 的一部分，该产品类型可能须按所采用的 KS IEC 性能标准检测；（3）在灯类别已公告的情况下，须为肯尼亚市场加贴 EPRA 能效标签。请确认具体产品（LED 灯还是集成灯具）是否属于已公告的 EPRA 类别，并在出货前核查现行 MEPS 等级及 KS 版本。
gap.zht: 肯亞沒有單一歐盟式橫向生態設計法規；能效義務按公告的電器類別，通過 EPRA 的 MEPS 加上相關 KS 性能標準（如自鎮流 LED 燈的 KS IEC 62612）適用。僅持有 GB 30255 / CEL 等級的中國製造商不能據此滿足肯亞要求：（1）中國等級不能映射為 EPRA 星級，後者依據公告的 MEPS 計量方法得出；（2）作為 PVoC 的一部分，該產品類型可能須按所採用的 KS IEC 性能標準檢測；（3）在燈類別已公告的情況下，須為肯亞市場加貼 EPRA 能效標籤。請確認具體產品（LED 燈還是集成燈具）是否屬於已公告的 EPRA 類別，並在出貨前核查現行 MEPS 等級及 KS 版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where gazetted — EPRA minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) and energy labelling apply to gazetted lighting categories under the Energy Act 2019; performance is assessed against the adopted KS IEC standard during PVoC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration required

source.publisher: Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (EPRA), Kenya

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Kenya regulates lighting energy performance through EPRA MEPS and labelling under the Energy Act 2019, together with the adopted KS IEC performance standard (e.g., KS IEC 62612), rather than a single EU-style horizontal Ecodesign regulation. A Chinese GB 30255 grade and China Energy Label do not transfer to Kenya: confirm whether the product is in a gazetted EPRA category, test to the adopted KS standard under PVoC, and apply the EPRA energy label where required. Verify the current MEPS level and KS edition before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 肯尼亚通过 EPRA 的 MEPS 及《2019 年能源法》下的标签制度，连同所采用的 KS IEC 性能标准（如 KS IEC 62612）监管照明能效，而非单一欧盟式横向生态设计法规。中国 GB 30255 等级及中国能效标识不可转用于肯尼亚：请确认产品是否属于已公告的 EPRA 类别，在 PVoC 下按所采用的 KS 标准检测，并在需要时加贴 EPRA 能效标签。出货前请核查现行 MEPS 等级及 KS 版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 肯亞通過 EPRA 的 MEPS 及《2019 年能源法》下的標籤制度，連同所採用的 KS IEC 性能標準（如 KS IEC 62612）監管照明能效，而非單一歐盟式橫向生態設計法規。中國 GB 30255 等級及中國能效標識不可轉用於肯亞：請確認產品是否屬於已公告的 EPRA 類別，在 PVoC 下按所採用的 KS 標準檢測，並在需要時加貼 EPRA 能效標籤。出貨前請核查現行 MEPS 等級及 KS 版本。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Label and EPRA Registration vs China Energy Label
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签与 EPRA 注册 vs 中国能效标识
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤與 EPRA 注冊 vs 中國能效標識

summary.en: Where a lighting product category is gazetted under the Energy (Appliances Energy Efficiency and Labelling) Regulations, EPRA requires the supplier or importer to register the appliance model with EPRA and to display the prescribed Kenyan energy label (a star-rating label) on the product and packaging before it is offered for sale. The energy rating is determined by testing to the metric set out in the relevant KS standard adopted from the IEC series. The label and registration obligation operates at the Kenyan in-country level and is typically discharged by the importer of record; the manufacturer must supply the test data and product information needed for registration. There is no EU-style EPREL-equivalent online database mutual recognition; the Kenyan registration is a separate national step verified alongside the KEBS PVoC route.
summary.zh: 在照明产品类别依据《能源（电器能效与标识）条例》已公告的情况下，EPRA 要求供应商或进口商在产品销售前向 EPRA 注册该电器型号，并在产品及包装上加贴规定的肯尼亚能效标签（星级标签）。能效评级依据相关 KS 标准（采自 IEC 系列）规定的计量方法检测确定。标签和注册义务在肯尼亚本地层面运作，通常由进口记录人（importer of record）履行；制造商须提供注册所需的检测数据和产品信息。不存在欧盟式 EPREL 同类在线数据库互认；肯尼亚注册为独立的国家步骤，与 KEBS PVoC 路径一并核验。
summary.zht: 在照明產品類別依據《能源（電器能效與標識）條例》已公告的情況下，EPRA 要求供應商或進口商在產品銷售前向 EPRA 注冊該電器型號，並在產品及包裝上加貼規定的肯亞能效標籤（星級標籤）。能效評級依據相關 KS 標準（採自 IEC 系列）規定的計量方法檢測確定。標籤和注冊義務在肯亞本地層面運作，通常由進口記錄人（importer of record）履行；製造商須提供注冊所需的檢測數據和產品信息。不存在歐盟式 EPREL 同類在線數據庫互認；肯亞注冊為獨立的國家步驟，與 KEBS PVoC 路徑一併核驗。

standards_or_laws: Energy (Appliances Energy Efficiency and Labelling) Regulations (Kenya) — EPRA model registration and energy label
KS IEC 62612 — Self-ballasted LED lamps performance (test metric basis for the energy rating)

summary.en: China's China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255-2019 is mandatory for LED room luminaires. Products must be registered with CQC (China Quality Certification Centre) or CECP (China Energy Conservation Programme) before affixing the CEL. The CEL shows Grade 1 to 3 based on absolute lm/W thresholds. There is no mutual recognition between the Kenyan EPRA energy-label registration and the CN CEL registration scheme.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255-2019 对 LED 室内照明产品实施强制性中国能效标识（CEL）。产品须在贴附中国能效标识前向中国质量认证中心（CQC）或中国节能产品认证（CECP）注册。CEL 依据绝对 lm/W 阈值显示 1 至 3 级。肯尼亚 EPRA 能效标签注册与中国能效标识注册方案之间不存在互认。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255-2019 對 LED 室內照明產品實施強制性中國能效標識（CEL）。產品須在貼附中國能效標識前向中國質量認證中心（CQC）或中國節能產品認證（CECP）注冊。CEL 依據絕對 lm/W 閾值顯示 1 至 3 級。肯亞 EPRA 能效標籤注冊與中國能效標識注冊方案之間不存在互認。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: The Kenyan EPRA model registration and star-rating energy label are national steps with no CN equivalent and no mutual recognition with the China Energy Label. Differences: (1) the Kenyan rating is derived from the metric in the adopted KS IEC standard, while the CN CEL uses absolute lm/W grades — they are not directly comparable and a product's CN grade does not determine its Kenyan star rating; (2) Kenyan registration is typically discharged by the in-country importer, who must obtain the manufacturer's test data, whereas CEL is held by the CN manufacturer; (3) the obligation only applies where the lighting category has been gazetted by EPRA — verify gazette coverage for the specific product type. A separate Kenyan label artwork is required and cannot reuse the CN CEL layout.
gap.zh: 肯尼亚 EPRA 型号注册及星级能效标签为国家步骤，无中国对应要求，且与中国能效标识不存在互认。差异：（1）肯尼亚评级依据所采用 KS IEC 标准中的计量方法得出，而中国 CEL 采用绝对 lm/W 等级——两者不可直接比较，产品的中国等级不能决定其肯尼亚星级；（2）肯尼亚注册通常由本地进口商履行，进口商须取得制造商的检测数据，而 CEL 由中国制造商持有；（3）该义务仅在照明类别已由 EPRA 公告时适用——请核查具体产品类型的公告覆盖范围。须制作独立的肯尼亚标签设计，不可沿用中国 CEL 版式。
gap.zht: 肯亞 EPRA 型號注冊及星級能效標籤為國家步驟，無中國對應要求，且與中國能效標識不存在互認。差異：（1）肯亞評級依據所採用 KS IEC 標準中的計量方法得出，而中國 CEL 採用絕對 lm/W 等級——兩者不可直接比較，產品的中國等級不能決定其肯亞星級；（2）肯亞注冊通常由本地進口商履行，進口商須取得製造商的檢測數據，而 CEL 由中國製造商持有；（3）該義務僅在照明類別已由 EPRA 公告時適用——請核查具體產品類型的公告覆蓋範圍。須製作獨立的肯亞標籤設計，不可沿用中國 CEL 版式。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where gazetted — EPRA model registration and the prescribed Kenyan energy label apply to gazetted lighting categories before sale; discharged at the in-country importer level under the Energy (Appliances Energy Efficiency and Labelling) Regulations
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP required before affixing CEL under GB 30255-2019

source.publisher: Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (EPRA), Kenya

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Where the lighting category is gazetted, EPRA model registration and the Kenyan star-rating energy label are mandatory national steps with no CN equivalent and no mutual recognition with the China Energy Label. The Kenyan rating is derived from the adopted KS IEC test metric, not the CN lm/W grade. Registration is typically discharged by the in-country importer using the manufacturer's test data. Confirm gazette coverage for the specific product type and prepare separate Kenyan label artwork before sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在照明类别已公告时，EPRA 型号注册及肯尼亚星级能效标签为强制性国家步骤，无中国对应要求，且与中国能效标识不存在互认。肯尼亚评级依据所采用 KS IEC 检测计量方法得出，而非中国 lm/W 等级。注册通常由本地进口商使用制造商的检测数据履行。请确认具体产品类型的公告覆盖范围，并在销售前准备独立的肯尼亚标签设计。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在照明類別已公告時，EPRA 型號注冊及肯亞星級能效標籤為強制性國家步驟，無中國對應要求，且與中國能效標識不存在互認。肯亞評級依據所採用 KS IEC 檢測計量方法得出，而非中國 lm/W 等級。注冊通常由本地進口商使用製造商的檢測數據履行。請確認具體產品類型的公告覆蓋範圍，並在銷售前準備獨立的肯亞標籤設計。
